decks.notes: This UWx Control deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's game plan with a mix of counterspells, removal, and card advantage. By using cards like Force of Will, Swords to Plowshares, and Narset, Parter of Veils, the deck aims to control the board and prevent the opponent from developing a strong board presence. The inclusion of various card draw spells like Ponder and Brainstorm helps the deck find its key pieces quickly, while cards like Lórien Revealed and Tune the Narrative provide additional control options. With a solid mana base and efficient answers, this deck aims to outlast and outplay the opponent in a longer game.

The main concept of this Aluren combo deck is to quickly get Aluren onto the battlefield to loop Acererak the Archlich and Atraxa, Grand Unifier to generate infinite mana and draw the entire deck. This is achieved by using various cantrips like Brainstorm and Ponder to find the combo pieces, while also having Show and Tell and Omniscience as backup plans to cheat out Aluren. The deck also includes interaction like Force of Will and Veil of Summer to protect the combo. The mana base is streamlined to maximize consistency and speed.

The deck revolves around quickly getting out powerful creatures like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn and Atraxa, Grand Unifier using Show and Tell and Sneak Attack. It also includes disruptive spells like Force of Will and Spell Pierce to protect the combo. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with huge threats before they have a chance to respond, and can also utilize Omniscience for additional combo potential. With plenty of card filtering and mana acceleration, the deck is designed for explosive plays and fast wins.

This control deck focuses on managing the opponent's threats through counterspells, removal spells, and card draw. It aims to control the game tempo by disrupting the opponent's plays and setting up its own win conditions. The deck utilizes a mix of powerful spells like Force of Will, Swords to Plowshares, and Brainstorm to control the board, while also including big threats like Murktide Regent and Uro, Titan of Nature's Wrath to close out the game. Leyline Binding and Quantum Riddler provide additional disruption and card advantage, ensuring the deck can outlast its opponents in a long game.

This deck focuses on using a combination of efficient creatures and disruptive spells to maintain control while putting pressure on the opponent. By protecting their board with counter magic and removal spells like Swords to Plowshares, the player can safely deploy powerful threats like Teferi, Time Raveler and Ketramose, the New Dawn. With a mix of card draw and graveyard hate, the deck aims to consistently out-value and outmaneuver the opponent in order to secure victory.

The main concept of this deck is to assemble the Cephalid Breakfast combo by using Nomads en-Kor and Cephalid Illusionist to mill the library, followed by casting Dread Return to bring back Thassa's Oracle or Narcomoeba to win the game. The deck also includes disruption in the form of counterspells like Force of Will and disruption cards like Thoughtseize, along with card selection and card draw spells to find the combo pieces quickly. The deck aims to win quickly and efficiently through a powerful combo with backup protection.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game by utilizing lands and spells that disrupt the opponent's strategy. By using cards like Wasteland, Ghost Quarter, and Crop Rotation, the deck can disrupt the opponent's mana base and prevent them from executing their game plan effectively. Additionally, cards like Life from the Loam and Exploration help to generate value by recurring lands and accelerating the deck's mana base. The deck also has the potential to create powerful combos with cards like Dark Depths and Thespian's Stage, allowing for quick and efficient win conditions.

This deck aims to quickly cheat out powerful, game-ending creatures like Emrakul and Atraxa using cards like Show and Tell, Sneak Attack, and Omniscience. The deck utilizes fast mana sources like Lotus Petal and Ancient Tomb to power out its threats ahead of schedule. With a suite of counterspells like Force of Will and Defense Grid to protect its game plan, the deck seeks to overwhelm opponents with its powerful creatures before they can establish their own board presence.

This deck focuses on utilizing fast mana acceleration and card draw to quickly build up resources and combo off. The key concept is to utilize cards like Lion's Eye Diamond and The Fantasticar to generate mana, while using cards like Dark Ritual and Cabal Ritual to generate more resources. The deck also utilizes cards like Burning Wish and Beseech the Mirror to tutor for specific combo pieces like Tendrils of Agony. The goal is to generate a large storm count and cast a lethal Tendrils of Agony to win the game.

This deck aims to control the game by using efficient creatures like Badgermole Cub and Wight of the Reliquary, supported by powerful spells like Green Sun's Zenith and Natural Order to search for key creatures like Craterhoof Behemoth. With a focus on mana acceleration through cards like Birds of Paradise and Gaea's Cradle, the deck can quickly overpower opponents and establish board dominance. Endurance and Thoughtseize provide disruption against opposing strategies, while cards like Allosaurus Shepherd and Atraxa, Grand Unifier offer additional utility and protection. The deck's strategy revolves around leveraging its mana advantage to outvalue and outlast opponents.

This deck focuses on using aggressive creatures to quickly overwhelm the opponent, while also disrupting their game plan with targeted removal and discard spells. The key strategy is to apply early pressure with efficient creatures like Amped Raptor and Ocelot Pride, while controlling the board with Swords to Plowshares and Cabal Therapy. The deck also features a sacrifice outlet in Goblin Bombardment for additional reach and removal options. The mana base is designed to support a mix of white, black, and red spells, with utility lands like Wasteland and Karakas to disrupt the opponent's plans.

The main focus of this deck is to relentlessly and aggressively deal quick damage to the opponent using cheap and efficient burn spells and aggressive creatures. The aim is to quickly reduce the opponent's life total to zero before they can stabilize or mount a defense. This Aggro-Burn archetype relies heavily on fast-paced gameplay and punishing the opponent for playing spells with cards like Eidolon of the Great Revel and Price of Progress, while also utilizing cards like Lightning Bolt, Lava Spike, and Chain Lightning to deal direct damage.

The main concept of this Legacy Control - Stoneblade deck is to control the game through a combination of removal spells, counterspells, and powerful planeswalkers. It aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan with cards like Force of Will and Swords to Plowshares while utilizing Stoneforge Mystic to search for powerful equipment like Batterskull and Kaldra Compleat. The deck also includes a variety of versatile spells like Brainstorm and Snapcaster Mage to maintain card advantage and manipulate the top of the deck. With strong control elements and powerful threats, this deck aims to outvalue and outmaneuver the opponent.

The main focus of this Mono Black Aggro deck is to quickly disrupt and control the opponent's resources through discard spells like Thoughtseize and Hymn to Tourach, while also utilizing efficient removal spells like Fatal Push and Snuff Out. The deck aims to apply early pressure and aggression with creatures such as Dauthi Voidwalker and Nethergoyf, backed up by efficient mana acceleration from cards like Dark Ritual. Additionally, the deck includes cards like Urza's Bauble and Mishra's Bauble to help with card selection and maintaining card advantage. The mana base is designed to support the aggressive game plan with a mix of fetch lands and Wasteland to disrupt the opponent's mana base.

This deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's strategy while putting pressure on them with aggressive creatures. It utilizes cards like Thalia, Guardian of Thraben and Spirit of the Labyrinth to slow down the opponent, while also using efficient removal like Swords to Plowshares. The deck also includes cards like Stoneforge Mystic to search for powerful equipment like Kaldra Compleat and Solitude for additional removal. With a strong mana base and disruptive elements, this Death & Taxes deck aims to control the game and overwhelm the opponent with its aggressive creatures.

The deck focuses on quickly and efficiently comboing off using Cephalid Illusionist and Nomads en-Kor to mill the library and then use Thassa's Oracle to win the game on the spot. It also utilizes cards like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Loki, God of Mischief to help dig for combo pieces and protect the combo with disruption like Force of Will and Swords to Plowshares. The deck is designed to be fast and resilient, aiming to win the game before opponents can disrupt the combo.
